sqls.executeSql: INSERT INTO pf_user_config (book_id, config_key, config_value, create_by, create_date, last_update_by, last_update_date) VALUES (${@book_id}, ${@config_key}, ${@config_value}, ${@user_id}, NOW(), ${@user_id}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE config_value = ${@config_value}, last_update_by = ${@user_id}, last_update_date = NOW()
